General.Name: XXF Group Holdings Ltd
General.Description: XXF Group Holdings Limited, an automobile retailer, provides automobile finance lease services through self-operated sales outlets in the People's Republic of China. The company sells non-luxury automobiles on direct finance lease, as well as car on a one-off basis; and offers automobile operating lease services and other automobile-related services. It also provides information technology and insurance agency services. XXF Group Holdings Limited was founded in 2007 and is headquartered in Fuzhou, China.

3.Name: Ms. Suet Ling  Sze A.C.I.S., A.C.S., ACIS ACS
